mean_cn: v.认出，辨别；  v.赏识，表彰；承认，意识到
mean_en: to know who somebody is or what something is when you see or hear them or it, because you have seen or heard them or it before
sentence: The little boy recognized his mother in the photo.
sentence_trans: 小男孩认出了照片里的妈妈。
word_etyma: re再，重新 + cogn知道 + ize使 → 再次知道 → recognize认出来
